description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, fenced backyard. The structure features a combination of white and gray exterior walls, large windows, and a driveway leading to a garage. The front yard includes a driveway with a parked car and landscaped greenery, while the backyard is expansive and contains a small play structure. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered entryway, and the house is surrounded by a wooden privacy fence. The overall design is open and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a fenced backyard, and a driveway with a garage.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the rear left, highlighting the large fenced backyard, play structure, and the back of the house.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the bungalow, featuring the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the right side and rear of the bungalow, emphasizing the backyard and the side of the house.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a direct view of the backyard and the rear facade, with the play structure and fence clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
